api_key_desc: Used for AI document analysis during indexing. Stored locally on this device.
username_desc: Your name displayed on the dashboard welcome banner.
track_cases: Track active cases, their statuses, and associated documents.
select_case_desc: Select a case from the list on the left to see its associated documents.
filter_files_placeholder: Filter files by name, tags, or notes...
no_files_found: No files found inside the case folder.
no_files_found_desc: Any Word, PDF, Excel or text documents placed in the directory will show up here.
no_files_match: No files match the filter query.
no_files_match_desc: Try clearing the search query or search for something else.
open_external: Open file in system default viewer
select_document_desc: Select a document from the list on the left to preview its content here.
home_desc: Manage your legal cases, search documents, and index new files from one central control panel.
